feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Japan XML Payment File – Clarification on Source of Katakana Name in Payment File
entry.content:
We are currently testing the new XML payment file format for bank transfers in Japan.

During our validation activities, we noticed that the name populated in the generated XML payment file does not correspond to the value expected by the business.

For the previous TXT payment file format used in Japan, SAP informed us that the name included in the payment file was derived from the bank account description, starting from character position 20 of the bank account name/description.

After moving to the new XML payment format, the name populated in the payment file appears to be different from the value that would be expected based on that logic.

For this reason, we would like to understand the standard derivation logic used by SAP in the Japanese XML payment format.

Could you please confirm:

  1. From which field the Katakana name included in the XML payment file is derived.
  2. Which master data object is used as the source of this information.
  3. Whether the XML payment format uses a different derivation logic compared to the previous TXT payment format.
  4. Whether any SAP documentatio

entry.title: Change of Customer number in Master Data
entry.content:
We have a customer with the number and the customer name is correct, But we want the customer number to be changed. We have a sales order for that customer now but can we change the customer number in backend code from SAP side because our client wants to change the number from the next transaction onwards. Is it possible to do the same.?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Approval process completed without Completion of all approvals
entry.content:
In the non-sequential approval when the approval group has more than 1 approver. The approval must be provided by every member of the approval group.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Report Purchase Order Invoice Plan Items
entry.content:
Hello there SAP Community, 

In S/4 Hana public cloud i struggle atm in finding a apropriate CDS view taht displays the Invoice Plan attached at a Purchase order. 

Is there any CDS view i can use?

Alternativly : Is there any other APP/API i can use to ultimativly display all Invoice Plan items on a Excel sheet? 

Ideas would be really appreciated. 

 

kind regards, 

Philipp

entry.title: Clarification/Enablement Request for Mass Delete Approach in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Clarification/Enablement Request for Mass Delete Approach in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition,Whether the mass-delete approach is supported in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.What prerequisites (business catalogs, roles, licenses, extensibility options, communication scenarios, etc.) are required.Whether Developer Extensibility is mandatory for this solution.How a CBO can be exposed for API-based deletion if no communication scenario is currently available.If this functionality is not yet available in our system release, whether there is an alternative SAP-supported approach for mass deletion of CBO records.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud | How to Replicate Worker/User Data from DEV to QAS ?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working in an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.
Currently, I have created and maintained a list of workers/users in DEV (Development System), and I would like to have the same worker/user data available in QAS (Test System).
Question: Is there a standard way to transport or replicate worker/user master data from DEV to QAS?


Thank you for your guidance.

QuocDT5

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud | Workspace and Tenant
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,


I am trying to better understand the landscape and terminology used in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, specifically the concepts of Workspace, Development Workspace, Development Tenant, and Customizing Tenant.


Could you please help clarify:

1. What is the purpose of a Workspace?
2. How does a Development Workspace differ from a general Workspace?
3. What is the role of a Development Tenant, and what types of activities are typically performed there?
4. What is a Customizing Tenant, and how does it differ from a Development Tenant?
5. How are these components related to each other in a standard SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud landscape?

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Not showing positive quantity in "Material document overview" app
entry.content: In the MB51 transaction, both positive and negative quantities are displayed. However, in the Material Documents Overview Fiori app, only the negative quantities are shown, while the positive quantities are not displayed.

entry.title: Cannot use Country Group in Manage Allocation
entry.content: I created country group by manage global hierarchies. Then, I create allocation cycle and, in the segment, receiver tabs. I added country as receiver object and change value type to group; however, the country group I created from manage global hierarchies is not available to be chosen.

entry.title: Ability to Group values by Accounting Doc while retaining navigation to Journal Entry Details
entry.content:
When using the Display G/L Account Line Items application, the system displays all individual line items posted to a given G/L account within each accounting document.

The customer would like to analyze the information at accounting document level, showing the aggregated amount per accounting document, instead of displaying every individual line item separately.

When grouping by Accounting Document, the system correctly calculates and displays the aggregated amount per accounting document.

However, the grouped records are displayed in collapsed groups and the user loses the ability to directly navigate from the grouped view to the journal entry/accounting document details.

As a result, users must expand the groups or switch views, which makes the analysis less efficient.

The customer would like to display the total amount per accounting document while still maintaining direct navigation to the underlying accounting document (journal entry).

  1. Is there any standard functionality (for example, Totals, Subtotals, or another analytical feature independent from Group By) that allows users to display aggregated amounts per accounting document without collapsing the line items and without losing drill-down/navigation capability?

  2. When using Group By → Accounting Document, is there a standard way to keep the navigation link to the journal entry details available, either at group level or after expanding the groups?

  3. Is there an alternative standard SAP S/4HANA Cloud application (for example, Manage Journal Entries, Display Line Items in General Ledger, or another reporting application) that provides:

    • Aggregation by accounting document,
    • Display of total amount per document,
    • Direct navigation to the journal entry details?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: While Outbound delivery creation, system checking available stock
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
Good day.

We have developed a background job (with the help of our technical team) to automatically create outbound deliveries for the schedule lines of Sales Scheduling Agreements in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

During delivery creation, we observed that the system creates outbound deliveries only for the quantity that is currently available in stock.

For example:

  • Available stock: 5

  • Schedule line quantity: 10

In this case, the background job creates an outbound delivery for 5 units, while the remaining 5 units remain open.

We observed the same behavior when creating outbound deliveries manually using VL10E. Therefore, I initially assumed that this is the standard SAP behavior, where the system checks stock availability during outbound delivery creation and creates deliveries only for the available quantity.

However, one of my senior colleagues mentioned that he has seen scenarios where the system created an outbound delivery for the entire schedule line quantity, even though sufficient stock was not available.

For example:

  • Available stock: 5

  • Schedule line quantity: 10

In that scenario, the outbound delivery was created for the full 10 units, despite only 5 units being available in stock.

Unfortunately, he is unsure under which circumstances or in which system this behavior was observed.

I would like to understand the following:

  1. Is it standard SAP behavior in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to always consider available stock during outbound delivery creation?

  2. Can this behavior be influenced by configuration or master data in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

  3. If yes, which configurations or settings control this behavior? For example:

    • Any SSCUI or configuration available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

    • Any other relevant settings

  4. Are there any SAP Notes, SAP Help documentation, blogs, or SAP Community posts that explain this behavior in detail?

I would appreciate any guidance or references that can help me understand this process more clearly.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Maintain Authorization Group Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m looking for a solution in the Public Cloud to manage authorization groups. Here’s an example using Manage Characteristics (CT04).
As far as I know, in on-premises systems, this was done in Customizing, where you assigned authorization objects to the authorization group.
I haven’t found a matching option in the Public Cloud.

How is this done in the Public Cloud?

Thanks!

entry.title: Roles / spaces question
entry.content:
Hi Guys.

We are moving to sap public cloud and wand to be able to create a menu structure for our ppl.

We want to have a space name in the upper menu like finance or warehouse and thena sub menu per role description.

We want to put ppl in different roles so they only see the submenu they have rights to.

Is that even possible?

Like you can see below i made 2 roles and the same space in every role.

and then made 2 pages in the role....

However since both roles have the same catalogs they see both submenus.

How can i fix this?

So they can only see there menu with the only submenu they have rights to?

Any thought or other approach to get the same thing?

 

Thanks!

 

David

entry.title: Released CDS Views for Handling Unit Information in Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Good day!

I am facing a challenge in retrieving Handling Unit (HU) header and item information through released CDS views.

Scenario:

  • I create an inbound delivery from the Post Goods Receipt for Production Order app.
  • After packing, the Handling Unit information is available in the system.
  • However, I could not find any released CDS view that provides the HU header and item details.

During my analysis, I found the following CDS views, and they contain the required HU information: I_HANDLINGUNITHEADERCOMBINED

I_HANDLINGUNITITEMCOMBINED

Unfortunately, both of these CDS views are not released for either Key User Extensibility or Developer Extensibility, so they cannot be consumed in a custom development.

Could anyone please suggest:

  • Any released CDS views that provide Handling Unit header and item information?
  • Any recommended APIs or alternative approaches?
  • Any SAP blogs, documentation, or best practices related to retrieving Handling Unit information in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud: Get Values from multiple tabs in Purchase Order Notes
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am trying to get the values of the multiple tabs of the Notes in Purchase Order, but I only seem to get the value of the Header Text tab only. I was wondering how I would be able to get the value of different tabs as I would be using the values in them to display in the print forms.

Regards,
Ley

entry.title: How to Link Two Analytical Queries in Embedded SAC App? "A linked dimension" Error
entry.content:
How to Link Two Analytical Queries in Embedded SAC App?
"A linked dimension for this model is not included in the visualization's dimension bindings" Error

I am creating an Embedded SAC Application in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and trying to link two Analytical Queries using Company Code. Both Company Code fields have the same data type, semantics, and values, and the link is created successfully.

However, the widget shows the error:

"A linked dimension for this model is not included in the visualization's dimension bindings."

How can I correctly connect/link these two queries? Is there any additional configuration required for linked dimensions or dimension bindings?

entry.title: how to create project billing request using API in sap public cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

In our project, we need to create project billing request via API same as in application "Manage project Billing".

I found this standard API is fit my needs, but we are facing some issues.
Overview | Project Billing Request | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

In post : http://projectbillingrequest/SAP__self.CreateProjectBillingRequest
There is a restriction for BillingWBSElementInternalID string 8.

But in our system billing element is more than 8.

Is there way to create project billing request using Standard API?

Best Regards,

entry.title: Forms Label Translation
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I would like to seek your assistance in if there is an translation application, tool, or CDS view in S/4HANA Cloud Public that can be used to translate form labels. For example, if I want to translate a form label from English to Dutch, I would like to provide the English label as input and receive the corresponding Dutch translation as the output.
 
Thank you!
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 
SAP Forms service by Adobe

entry.title: Default User Layout in Material Documents Overview App
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We would like to set a user-specific default layout in the Material Documents Overview app so that the same layout is automatically applied whenever the app is accessed, either directly or indirectly.

We tested this behavior in the SAP Public Cloud environment. The default layout works correctly when the app is accessed directly. However, when the Material Documents Overview app is launched from another application, such as Display Stock Overview (MMBE), the system resets the layout to the standard default instead of retaining the user-specific layout.

As a result, users must manually select and apply their preferred layout each time, which impacts reporting consistency and requires additional time and effort.

Please confirm whether this is the standard system behavior or if there is a configuration or enhancement available to ensure that the user-specific default layout is retained regardless of how the app is accessed?

entry.title: Request for Alternative SAP App for Invoice-wise Collection Posting
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We have a requirement from our customer to post invoice-wise collection data without using the following apps:

  1. Post Incoming Payments (F1345)
  2. Clear Incoming Payments (F0773)

Could you please suggest an alternative standard SAP core app or self-service app that supports invoice-wise collection posting?

We appreciate your guidance and look forward to your recommendation.

We have aleady created a custom role only read permission allowed with this two app but getting authorization error to do this clearing
